    def eligible_for_glaucoma_screening(self) -> bool:
        # Age 40 or older OR family history of glaucoma
        if self.age >= 40 or self.family_history_of_glaucoma == 'yes':
            return True
        # High-risk racial groups at age 35 or older

        if self.age >= 35 and self.race in high_risk_races:
            return True
        return False
